title: Nuisances; presumption of the creation of a nuisance based on certain residential local ordinance violations; provide
subject: BUILDINGS AND HOUSING
CORPORATIONS, PARTNERSHIPS, AND ASSOCIATIONS
NUISANCES
REVENUE AND TAXATION
SOCIAL SERVICES

abstracts.abstract: A BILL to be entitled an Act to amend Chapter 1 of Title 41 of the O.C.G.A., relating to general provisions regarding nuisances, so as to provide for a presumption of the creation of a nuisance based on certain residential local ordinance violations; to amend Article 1 of Chapter 5 of Title 48 of the O.C.G.A., relating to ad valorem taxation of property generally; to amend Article 7 of Chapter 4 of Title 49 of the O.C.G.A., relating to medical assistance generally; to amend Chapter 2 of Title 14 of the O.C.G.A., relating to business corporations, so as to require corporations to provide a list of authorized filers to the Secretary of State; to provide for definitions; to provide for related matters; to repeal conflicting laws; and for other purposes.
